decompressGzip.title: Decompress Gzip
decompressGzip.description: Automatically gunzip *.gz objects before splitting into events.

outputFormat.title: Event Output Format
outputFormat.description: Emit events as raw lines or wrap them in JSON with metadata.

checkpointKey.title: Checkpoint Namespace
checkpointKey.description: Optional custom key to namespace checkpoints when the collector is used multiple times.

queueName.title: SMQ Queue Name
queueName.description: Aliyun Simple Message Queue (MNS) queue subscribed to the OSS bucket notifications.

queueEndpoint.title: SMQ Endpoint
queueEndpoint.description: Fully qualified SMQ endpoint URL (for example https://<accountId>.mns.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com).

queueWaitSeconds.title: SMQ Wait Seconds
queueWaitSeconds.description: Long-poll wait seconds per receive request (0-30).

queueVisibilityTimeout.title: SMQ Visibility Timeout
queueVisibilityTimeout.description: Optional override for message visibility timeout (seconds) after receive. Set to 0 to use the queue default.

queueBatchSize.title: SMQ Batch Size
queueBatchSize.description: Number of queue messages requested per poll (1-16).

queueMaxMessages.title: SMQ Messages per Run
queueMaxMessages.description: Stop discovery after receiving this many queue messages during a single run.

ossEndpoint.title: OSS Bucket Endpoint
ossEndpoint.description: Fully qualified OSS bucket endpoint, for example https://oss-cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com.

bucket.title: OSS Bucket Name
bucket.description: Name of the OSS bucket to poll for new objects.

accessKeyIdSecretName.title: Access Key ID Secret Name
accessKeyIdSecretName.description: Cribl secret name that stores the AccessKeyId.

accessKeySecretSecretName.title: Access Key Secret Name
accessKeySecretSecretName.description: Cribl secret name that stores the AccessKeySecret.

securityTokenSecretName.title: Security Token Secret Name
securityTokenSecretName.description: Optional Cribl secret name that stores the STS security token.

includeFilters.title: Include Filters
includeFilters.description: Only collect objects whose key contains at least one of these substrings. Leave empty for no include filtering.

excludeFilters.title: Exclude Filters
excludeFilters.description: Skip objects whose key contains any of these substrings.
